overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works approved a street construction contract to the lowest bidder Switlick for approximately $1.28 million, approved a change order for $14,436.50 for unexpected underground utility issues, and processed routine pay estimates and licensing matters. All items passed unanimously.
committee: City of Wausau Board of Public Works

agenda.item: Call to order and consideration of March 10th regular Board of Public Works minutes
Open bids for 26th Street construction project
2025 Street Construction Project A (Rolph Street, Cherry Street) - Change Order 1
2025 Street Construction Project A - Pay Estimate Number Nine
Portland cement concrete license for KSK Incorporated

discussions.item: March 10th Board of Public Works Minutes
discussions.body: Minutes from the previous meeting were approved. A motion was made and seconded, passing unanimously with all voting 'aye'.

Seven bids were opened and read aloud. Switlick submitted the lowest bid at $1,279,089.75, narrowly beating Hos at $1,280,877.96 - a difference of less than $1,800. Other bidders ranged up to Earth at $1,686,780.75. Board members noted the tight bidding. A motion to approve Switlick as the winning bidder passed unanimously.
This bid opening was postponed as the deadline was extended. The item will return at a future meeting.

discussions.item: 2025 Street Construction Project A - Change Order 1
discussions.body: Staff presented Change Order 1 totaling $14,436.50 for Haw Suns Incorporated covering four items: an inside drop on a manhole ($4,856) due to an unrecorded large diameter sanitary service; water main tie-in adjustments ($2,317.50) when existing 6-inch pipe was found instead of expected 8-inch; miscellaneous storm sewer work ($5,016) at $66 per linear foot; and geogrid installation ($2,247) for approximately 750 square yards near Thomas Jefferson Elementary due to poor soil conditions. Change Order 2 regarding liquidated damages was deferred pending further discussions. Motion to approve passed unanimously.

discussions.item: 2025 Street Construction Project A - Pay Estimate 9
discussions.body: Pay estimate number nine for Haw Suns Incorporated covering work completed through year-end was recommended for approval at $535,114.20. Motion passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Portland Cement Concrete License - KSK Incorporated
discussions.body: Board member Vinnie confirmed he reviewed the application and everything was in order. Motion to approve the license for KSK Inc. passed unanimously.

actionItems: Award 26th Street construction project contract to Switlick at $1,279,089.75
Approve Change Order 1 for Haw Suns Inc. at $14,436.50
Process Pay Estimate 9 for Haw Suns Inc. at $535,114.20
Issue Portland cement concrete license to KSK Incorporated
North 8th Avenue bid opening rescheduled for future meeting
Change Order 2 with liquidated damages discussion to return at future meeting
title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting - 3/17/2026
